title: ixeridium dentatum subsp. nipponicum
intro: Ixeridium dentatum subsp. nipponicum, also known as Japanese wintergrass, is a type of perennial plant in the family Compositae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ixeridium dentatum subsp. nipponicum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and infillings, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
